hero_desc: Upload STL, OBJ, PLY files and create stunning photorealistic renders with professional lighting, materials, and camera controls. No software installation required.
video_desc: Watch how easy it is to upload your 3D models and create professional renders in minutes, not hours.
video_no_support: Your browser does not support the video tag.
video_feature_2_desc: See changes as you make them
features_desc: Start with our core visualization features today, with advanced rendering capabilities coming soon.
features_card_1_desc: Drag and drop your STL, OBJ, PLY, or 3MF files directly into the browser. No software installation or account creation required.
features_card_2_desc: Toggle wireframe mode, smooth shading, perspective/orthographic views, and coordinate axes. Real-time visualization with instant feedback.
features_card_3_desc: Optimized WebGL rendering for smooth interaction. Works directly in your browser with no plugins or downloads required.
features_card_4_desc: Professional lighting presets including plain white, 3-point lighting, warm studio, and custom background colors for clean presentations.
features_card_5_desc: Multiple view presets (Front, Back, Left, Right, Top, Bottom, Isometric) with zoom controls and camera reset functionality.
features_card_6_desc: Works on any device with a modern web browser. Desktop, tablet, or mobile - your 3D models are always accessible.
features_coming_desc: We're working on powerful new features to make VizCad the ultimate 3D visualization platform.
features_coming_card_1_desc: Advanced light positioning and intensity controls
features_coming_card_2_desc: Focal length, aperture, and depth of field
about_desc_1: VizCad was born from the frustration of complex, expensive 3D rendering software. We believe that creating beautiful visualizations of your 3D models shouldn't require extensive knowledge of professional 3D design or expensive software licenses.
about_desc_2: Our mission is to make professional 3D rendering accessible by providing powerful, intuitive tools that work directly in your web browser. Whether you're an engineer, architect, designer, or hobbyist, VizCad gives you the tools to showcase your work beautifully.
about_card_desc: VizCad is the vision of a mechatronics engineer who combines a passion for 3D visualization with years of experience in 3D CAD design. Following years of hands-on work, a significant gap in the market was identified with the belief that professional tools should be accessible to everyone. We are committed to continuously developing this platform to serve the creative and technical community.
footer_company_desc: Professional 3D visualization made simple and accessible. Create stunning renders directly in your browser.

landing_hero_badge: Connect to the Future with VizCAD
landing_hero_title_2: Stop Being Tied to Your Desktop.
landing_hero_desc: No installation. No waiting. No limits. Open your STEP, STL, and OBJ files instantly in the browser. Present your projects to the world with a single link, not bulky file transfers.
landing_hero_card_2_desc: One link to the other side of the world
landing_features_subtitle: Stay in control of your project even outside the office.
landing_features_1_desc: Your office is wherever you are. Not just at your desk; on the construction site, on the production line, or in a meeting. Inspect complex assemblies on your mobile device with high performance.
landing_features_2_desc: Don't bother sending GBs of files. Instantly project your work to your partner's screen on the other side of the world with a single link.
landing_features_3_desc: Spend your time producing, not waiting, with models that render in seconds. VizCAD processes even the most complex structures at browser speed.
landing_features_4_desc: Don't get lost between versions. Your project's past and future are in the VizCAD cloud, always up-to-date and at your fingertips.
landing_how_subtitle: Sharing has never been this easy.
landing_how_step1_desc: Drag your file, let your model come alive in seconds with the power of the cloud.
landing_how_step2_desc: Either present to the world with a public viewing link, or invite your team into a secure workspace.
landing_how_step3_desc: Comment, check revisions, and get approvals. Don't wait to get back to the office.
landing_services_subtitle: The simplest form of sharing and collaboration. You don't need barriers.
landing_showcase_subtitle: Professional tools to bring your 3D projects to the next level.
landing_showcase_collab_desc: Invite your team to your workspace and collaborate on complex projects as if you were in the same room. Comment on designs, track changes, and get approvals – all without leaving your browser.
landing_showcase_sharing_desc: Stop sending large files via email. Generate a shareable link and let anyone view your 3D models instantly – no account creation or software installation required on their end.
landing_showcase_studio_desc: Configure lighting, materials, and camera settings to create stunning presentations of your CAD models. Export high-quality renders that impress clients and stakeholders.
landing_services_1_desc: Don't waste time with account creation or software downloads on the other end. Let them click the link and inspect your model instantly. Sharing should be this easy.
landing_services_2_desc: Don't pay a fortune for massive systems to manage complex projects. With VizCAD, your team works as if they're at the same screen, no matter where they are.
pricing_subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs and discover the power of 3D visualization.
pricing_free_description: Perfect starter plan for small projects and individual users.
pricing_premium_description: Advanced features for professionals and teams.
landing_cta_title: Don't Let Your Designs Get Trapped Within Office Walls.
landing_cta_desc: Discover the power of mobility with VizCAD. Carry your projects with you, share them whenever you want, and unleash your true potential. Your first 1GB of storage (and freedom) is on us.

header.title: Frequently Asked
header.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about VizCAD's features, capabilities, and how to get the most out of our 3D visualization platform.

card.title: Common Questions
card.description: Click on any question below to see the answer

what-is-vizcad.question: What is VizCAD?
what-is-vizcad.answer: VizCAD is a platform that allows you to easily visualize your existing CAD designs through the web without the need for complex software. It helps professionals like engineers, architects, and product designers to quickly and professionally visualize their designs.

supported-browsers.question: Which browsers should I use for VizCAD?
supported-browsers.answer: VizCAD works on all modern web browsers with WebGL support. You can access it from any device such as a computer, tablet, or mobile phone.

file-formats.question: What file formats does VizCAD support?
file-formats.answer: VizCAD currently supports STL, OBJ, PLY, and 3MF file formats.

getting-started.question: How do I get started with VizCAD?
getting-started.answer: Getting started with VizCAD is quite easy. You just need to drag and drop your STL, OBJ, PLY, or 3MF file directly into your browser. No software installation or account creation is required.

system-requirements.question: What are the system requirements?
system-requirements.answer: The application runs entirely in your web browser, so no special installation is required. A modern browser with WebGL support is sufficient for a smooth experience. Performance may vary depending on the browser and device specifications.

collaboration.question: Can I collaborate with others on VizCAD projects?
collaboration.answer: VizCAD emerged to solve the problem of accessing design files during teamwork. While the application makes designs accessible to everyone, there is currently no information about built-in collaboration features.

is-it-free.question: Is VizCAD free to use?
is-it-free.answer: Yes, VizCAD is designed with a Freemium model. With this model, you can use the core features for free. Premium subscription options will be offered for access to more advanced tools and features.

data-security.question: How secure is my data in VizCAD?
data-security.answer: VizCAD performs client-side rendering instead of using a cloud-based system. This means your data is processed locally, in your browser, as much as possible. This approach increases security by eliminating the need to store your files on external servers.

how-is-it-different.question: How does VizCAD differ from competitors like AutoCAD?
how-is-it-different.answer: VizCAD's biggest difference is that it offers a professional service with a user-friendly interface, unlike complex and expensive software like Autodesk. Unlike amateur-level CAD viewers on the market, VizCAD allows all users to convert their designs into high-quality visuals without needing extensive software knowledge.

development-process.question: What was VizCAD's development process like and what were the main turning points?
development-process.answer: The initial MVP (Minimum Viable Product) version of VizCAD was just a CAD file preview tool. Based on user feedback, the decision was made to focus on visualization tools rather than technical features. This transformation turned the product from a simple preview tool into a powerful visualization platform and led to a redesign of the product roadmap.
